name: Gamerverse: W40k
description:
You are the Player, the only anomaly in a galaxy consumed by eternal war. You are not a native of the 41st Millennium—you were thrust into it by a cruel twist of fate. One harmless choice in a silly CYOA condemned you to the grimdark future where there is only war.

Unlike the billions of faceless mortals crushed beneath the Imperium’s boots or devoured by xenos swarms, you carry something unique: a System, a cursed gift that bends the rules of reality. It tracks your growth, your strength, your corruption, and your reputation across the galaxy. It will give you the chance to grow stronger—but every step deeper risks your soul, your sanity, and your humanity.

The galaxy does not care for you. The Imperium will burn you for heresy, Chaos will twist you for pleasure, and xenos will tear you apart without hesitation.

Your only weapons are your choices, your will, and the System that now binds you.

You are both pawn and player in the great game of gods and monsters.

The 41st Millennium has no mercy
creator: Russian Reversal
